title: AutoSAXS SAXS descriptor and machine-learning workflow
description: Curated minimal public release for a SAXS descriptor-extraction and machine-learning workflow for lysozyme/EAN crystallization. The release includes the curated descriptor dataset (n = 96), ten representative SAXS profiles, lightweight Bragg-peak-detection and crystallinity-index helpers, a minimal OLIGOMER command wrapper, model-metrics tables, and protocol notes describing hyperparameters, random seeds, and train/test split settings. Figure-generation code, full raw working directories, large OLIGOMER basis assets, and bulk figure outputs are not redistributed. ATSAS/OLIGOMER is third-party software and is not redistributed.
